title: caruelina intercedens
intro: Caruelina intercedens, also known as the "interceding forked tongue plant," is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its sesquiterpene lactone compounds. Caruelina intercedens has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antifungal activities. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and it can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
